purpose: settings.update_mode accepts any str (the setter type-checks only): 'junk' silently behaves as intersection because every consumption site is a string-equality against 'override' — the unvalidated-string class. Reasoning probes carry the same values as update-mode-default's (verified digest-equal at authoring); only the mode-knob probe differs, reading back the junk string verbatim.
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md setting:update_mode unvalidated-string; corpus-flagged no-domain-validation hypothesis, reproduced at the pin
